reviews.comment:
Buen parador de ruta, falta limpieza en el parque y un área para ingresar con mascotas para comer.

(Translated by Google)
Good rest stop along the route, the park needs cleaning and there needs to be an area where pets can eat.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURobU16bXFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Parada mano a capital desde la costa obligada. Mejor que Atalaya que te afana por el nombre. Excelente atención y productos, precios normales como en todas las YPF.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop on the way to the capital from the coast. Better than Atalaya, which rips you off just for the name. Excellent service and products, normal prices like all YPF stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURobU9UZkl3EAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre q vamos a la costa paramos en este lugar. Limpio. Muy bien atendido. Y cosas riiiicas. Los quesos son tremendos. Las medialunas este año bajaron un poco. No estaban tan ricas.

(Translated by Google)
Whenever we go to the coast, we stop at this place. Clean. Excellent service. And delicious food. The cheeses are amazing. The croissants were a little less good this year. They weren't as tasty.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURocVBYUFBBEAE
